description: Account Contract Test + Test Gaps. (1) Accounts is the ONLY entity without a contract test file (T-01). (2) No-op buttons untested — 6 CRITICAL no-op buttons have no click behavior tests (T-02). (3) Tenant isolation untested in router tests (T-03). (4) No E2E Playwright tests for account CRUD flow (T-04). (5) Owner display untested — tests don't verify owner name/title rendering (T-05). Audit: docs/audit/account-detail-wiring-audit.md section 19.

wiring_complete.target: Contract test passing; E2E CRUD flow passing; >=90% coverage
